description_long: This is a compact, modern bungalow with a simple geometric layout, featuring a main rectangular structure and an attached secondary volume with a brown shed roof. The front facade is defined by two large, dark-framed windows and a central entry door, all set behind a white metal fence and gate. The building is surrounded by a low perimeter wall, enclosing a paved yard area. The rooflines are flat and shed-style, with the main section having a slightly sloped roof and the secondary section a more pronounced brown shed roof. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray or white render, giving the house a clean, contemporary appearance. Minimal architectural ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor space suggest a utilitarian, urban design.
description: A modern, compact bungalow with flat and shed roofs, light-colored walls, and a fenced front yard. The facade features large windows and a central entry, enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, and the white metal fence and gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shed roof, the length of the building, and the paved yard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brown shed roof and the back of the main structure, with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end of the main roof and the secondary volume's brown roof.
